card_description: Orphics is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Associated with dictionary terms: Orphic. Context: "Dick formulaizes a law of "Cosmic Justice" (Ma'at/Tao): when an oppressor (B) "oversteps" its limit against an innocent victim (C), it triggers a "justification" by Valis that confers divinity (Apotheosis) on the victim and destroys the oppressor."
